---
title: "Working with pre-existing lists"
author:
- Torsti Schulz
- Aapo Kahilainen
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Working with pre-existing lists}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# Complementing a pre-existing list

# Comparison to the optimal alternative
